headline: Intelligence Engineered on the Laws of the Universe.
subheadline: Heady AI pioneers Continuous Semantic Logic — a φ-scaled architecture that replaces binary Boolean gates with geometric truth functions derived from Sacred Geometry. Where others iterate on transformers, we are rewriting the foundational mathematics of machine cognition.
body: The Heady CSL Engine operates through seven gate types — THRESHOLD, AMPLIFY, SUPPRESS, ROUTE, MERGE, SPLIT, and OBSERVE — each governed by the golden ratio (φ = 1.618033988749895) and mapped across a high-dimensional 3D vector space. This is not prompt engineering. This is cognitive architecture.
